apps.name: Demo HTTP
apps.description: Demo app showing HTTP GET request using the PikaPython environment. Fetches a random 5-letter word and displays it on screen.
apps.author: FallMarsisus

apps.name: Picross
apps.description: A puzzle game where you fill in a grid based on numerical clues
apps.author: FallMarsisus

apps.name: Pomodoro Timer
apps.description: A simple Pomodoro timer to help with time management and focus.
apps.author: FallMarsisus

apps.name: Wordle
apps.description: The classic Wordle word-guessing game. Guess the 5-letter word in 6 tries. Colors indicate correct letters (green), misplaced letters (yellow) or absent letters (gray).
apps.author: FallMarsisus
